---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or workflow improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## What are you trying to do?

Describe the workflow or goal. Focus on the *outcome* you want, not a specific implementation.

## How does the current behavior fall short?

What's blocking or frustrating about the current panel?

## Proposed solution (optional)

If you already have an idea of how this could work, sketch it here. Feel free to be informal — mockups, pseudo-code, or "it should behave like XYZ in app Y".

## Alternatives considered

Any workarounds you've already tried, or other tools that solve a similar problem.

## Additional context

Screenshots, sample files, links to relevant CSP / AE docs, etc.
